title: coleus rutenbergianus
intro: Coleus rutenbergianus, also known as Fire Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, characterized by its vibrant red or orange tubular flowers and attractive foliage. Traditionally, Coleus rutenbergianus has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coleus rutenbergianus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Coleus rutenbergianus can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
